raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Post-launch landing","name":"What feels different for you after the feature shipped on Monday?","description":"Opens a safe read on whether the quieter week is just post-launch decompression or something else.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet this week","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter this week, what's underneath that?","description":"Uses the observed change to invite a direct but non-accusatory explanation.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team signal","name":"How has the team response to that feature landed for you?","description":"Checks whether recognition, pressure, or something else is shaping her state after the launch.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next quarter shape","name":"What do you expect to own next quarter?","description":"Surfaces her own mental model of upcoming ownership before new work is introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sequence tradeoff","name":"What would you rather keep out of your plate next quarter?","description":"Forces a useful trade-off on sequencing and protects against hidden overcommitment.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentor reality","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week?","description":"Turns a vague aspiration into a concrete commitment and time-cost check.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentor support","name":"What would you need from me to make mentoring real?","description":"Surfaces the support, constraint, or permission needed to restart the mentoring thread.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rewrite interface","name":"Where do you see the billing rewrite touching your scope?","description":"Lets her map likely interface points without presuming the rewrite is already part of her plan.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"No-go zone","name":"What should we avoid pulling you into next quarter?","description":"Forces a clear boundary so the next stretch does not quietly crowd out her priorities.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given all that, what's the first concrete thing you want to move by our next check-in?","description":"Closes by converting the conversation into one near-term action or decision.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
